input.content: Search X since 2026-07-19 for posts mentioning any of: Verdikta OR "AI-judged bounties" OR bounties.verdikta.org OR "AI arbiter Base" OR "AI bounty escrow" OR @verdikta19633. For each post return: @handle, full text, date, whether the author reads as a project or builder (from bio/links), engagement counts, and the direct link https://x.com/handle/status/ID.
